---
title: "Web Development"
---

```{r pic, fig.align='center', out.width='50%', echo=FALSE}
pacman::p_load(pacman, knitr, tidyverse)
opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
pic <- './site_libs/WDD.png'
include_graphics(pic)
```

#### Refers to building, creating, and an maintaining websites. 

--- Related to [Web Design](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Web_design), [Web Marketing](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Online_advertising), [Visual Media](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Mass_media) and [Software Design](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Software_design).

<!-- Brigham Young University - Idaho offers many different Web Design and Development courses and degrees. I have taken CSE 121b, CSE 341, WDD 100, and WDD 330. -->
